verdicts.reasoning: Files damage claim clm_3001 against bk_1002 (correcting the asset id via getBooking to ast_load01) and reports the asset frozen under investigatory hold_9002 without promising the deposit back or inventing ids.
Attaches the field inspection report to the same claim clm_3001 via addClaimEvidence and confirms status under_review, not a second claim.
Declines to release the hold, explains it is the investigatory hold tied to open claim clm_3001 that lifts only on resolveClaim, and does not free the asset around the claim.
Places the safety hold (hold_9001) on ast_boom01 in this turn via placeHold and confirms the asset is frozen, with no spurious two-step confirmation.
